raw_source.title: [HK/Remote] SynFutures Company is looking for Web3.0 Backend Developer
raw_source.body:
## About
A rapidly growing decentralized derivatives protocol (DeFi) with over $70b cumulative trading volume.
Distributed team of crypto natives, ex-Wall Street veterans, and blockchain technology experts.
Backed by top-tier tech investors, including Pantera Capital, Polychain, SIG, Framework, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, and Hashkey Capital.
## Responsibilities
Design,  build,  and  maintain  scalable,  high-performance  Web3  backend  services, 
including  but  not  limited  to  on-chain  transaction  bots,  liquidation,  arbitrage,  and 
hedging. 
 
Contribute to the construction of risk control systems, responsible for designing and 
developing risk control models and warning mechanisms to ensure fund security. 
 
Responsible for designing and developing Subgraph blockchain data indexes, as well 
as building local centralized databases, to provide data support for product decision-
making. 
 
Take charge of the architectural design and development of new products and SDK 
versions,  collaborate  with  frontend  developers  and  product  managers,  lead  code 
development testing, and actively drive product launches. 
 
Participate  in  the  development  and  construction  of  underlying  blockchain  libraries, 
providing  stable,  consistent,  and  efficient  interaction  interfaces  for  upper-layer 
applications. 
 
Responsible for third-party data platforms integration, designing stable, efficient, and 
secure API interface services.
## Requirements
Bachelor’s degree or above, major in computer science or a related engineering field, 
with at least 3 years of backend or Web3-related experience. 
 
Proficiency in Web3 technology stack: ethers.js, hardhat, foundry, etc., with in-depth 
interaction with smart contracts. 
 
Mastery of at least one programming language among TypeScript (NodeJS), Golang, 
Java, Python, or Rust. 
 
Familiarity  with  Docker  container  and  experience  in  development  and  deployment 
based on cloud services (AWS/Google Cloud/Azure). 
 
Familiar with distributed system and database design, with experience in designing 
and developing large-scale high-concurrency systems. 
Proficient in B/S architecture for web services and RESTful API design. 
 
Strong  business  understanding,  logical  thinking,  and  the  ability  to  solve  complex 
problems. 
 
Excellent  team  collaboration  and  communication  skills,  with  a  strong  sense  of 
execution and project iteration awareness. 
 
Prior experience with open-source projects, work experience in the DeFi field, and 
excellent English reading and writing skills are preferred. 
 
Proactive, self-driven, with a strong sense of responsibility and ownership. 
## Nice to Haves

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not:Yes
- Remote or not:HK or Remote

## Salary and Benefits
HKD 35K+

## Work Location
HK or Remote
## Contact
[hiring@synfutures.com](mailto:hiring@synfutures.com)

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]
